gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer found two preflight semantics gaps; both were fixed and the reviewer approved after rerunning release-evidence, release-bundle, and diff-check gates.
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Added invalid_record_type_paths to release-evidence preflight status
Made preflight reject readable JSON artifacts assigned to the wrong release input role
why: Prevent V1 release workflows from treating swapped or wrong artifact JSON as valid preflight inputs before strict validation and bundling.
